notes:
## Fit v1.0.1

- feat(ui): implement LeftSidebar component for projects and sessions management
- feat(ui): implement Portal component using React createPortal
- feat(ipc): add checkDirectoryExists and resolveWorkspacePath IPC helpers
- refactor(ui): update Rust icon usage and add custom inline SVG MarkdownIcon in getFileIcon helper
- refactor(types): declare RESOLVE_WORKSPACE_PATH in AppAction union
- feat(store): add RESOLVE_WORKSPACE_PATH action and update active workspace/session handling
- style: replace workspace bar with left sidebar layout and style global tooltips and portals
- refactor(i18n): unify description, update session texts, and add terminal shortcuts translations
- refactor(terminal): persist active CLI, replace split dropdown with direct split buttons, and style updates
- refactor(ui): remove translation condition in LivePreview element inspector tooltip
- refactor(ui): simplify WorkspaceEditModal to only support project renaming
- refactor(ui): update Italian translation order in WelcomeScreen relative time helper
- refactor(ui): clean up language options and filter dictation models in SettingsModal
- refactor(ui): remove i18n usage in SessionContextMenu
- refactor(git): clean up and simplify GitPanel action dropdown menus and modal overlays
- feat(ui): support deleting multiple selected files with list preview in modal
- feat(ui): update FileContextMenu to support multi-select and conditional rename
- feat(ui): integrate LeftSidebar, custom tooltips, and handle missing workspaces
- refactor(tauri): register new workspace path resolution commands in app runner
- feat(tauri): auto-resolve renamed/missing workspace paths on state load
- feat(tauri): add check_directory_exists command to filesystem module
- chore: fix release notes in updater.json
- chore: update tauri updater endpoint to fit
